one_liner: Stratos Cloud is the leading platform for the future of work in the AI era.
use_of_funds_summary: Scale go-to-market and expand the team to capture the trillion-dollar TAM.
transcript_text: We are building the leading platform for the future of work in the AI era. Our team is uniquely positioned to win this trillion-dollar market. We have deep domain expertise and a defensible moat. Our product is 10x better than the competition. We are growing 30 percent month over month from a small base. Our north star metric is engagement. We are obsessed with our customers. We move fast and break things. Our culture is bar-raising and high-agency. The market is enormous and growing rapidly. The timing is right. The technology is finally ready. Network effects compound over time. Our flywheel is self-reinforcing. We are the team to win this market. We are raising to scale go-to-market and expand the team to capture the trillion-dollar TAM. We have a clear path to category leadership.
